company_description:
Nerbio is revolutionizing in-hospital patient monitoring by integrating intelligent FDA-cleared devices with the power of mobile technology.

Our flagship product iTOF® is the world’s first and only FDA-cleared wireless app-controlled quantitative train-of-four (TOF) monitor. Designed for use with smartphones and tablets iTOF delivers precise real-time neuromuscular assessments—without the need for bulky standalone equipment or large capital investment.

Now enhanced with advanced AI assistance iTOF enables clinicians to more accurately guide the dosing of neuromuscular blocking agents and determine optimal timing for post-operative recovery—improving safety efficiency and outcomes in perioperative care.

Nerbio is building a comprehensive platform of mobile AI-powered monitoring solutions—advancing our vision of smarter more connected and more effective care for clinicians and hospitals worldwide.

We are Uber. The go-getters. The kind of people who are relentless about our mission to help people go anywhere and get anything and earn their way. Movement is what we power. It's our lifeblood. For all the things you want to get. For all the ways you want to earn. Across the entire world. In real time. At the incredible speed of now.

The idea for Uber was born on a snowy night in Paris in 2008 and ever since then our DNA of reimagination and reinvention carries on. We've gone from connecting rides on 4 wheels to 2 wheels to 18-wheel freight deliveries. From takeout meals to daily essentials to prescription drugs to just about anything you need at any time and earning your way. At Uber the pursuit of reimagination is never finished never stops and is always just beginning.

I founded Streamlined Ventures with a vision of building a thought-leading investment platform rooted in the philosophical belief that founders of companies are the true heroes of entrepreneurial value creation in our society. Streamlined is focused on leading seed rounds in applied AI and applied data science companies across business and consumer applications as well as the infrastructure that enables them.

At Streamlined I have led seed investments in almost 20 companies valued at over $1Bn including iconic companies such as Applovin (IPO) Doordash (IPO) Rappi Rigetti (IPO) Forge (IPO) OpenGov (acquisition) EasyPost Speechify FLYR Labs Rescale Medable Bolt TubiTV (acquisition) etc. I am also an investor in numerous venture capital funds. In addition I helped co-found the full lifecycle investment firm Cota Capital.

Prior to that I was a senior member of the investment team and helped build venture capital firm Globespan Capital Partners. We had invested in early stage rounds of numerous high profile companies including Palo Alto Networks (IPO) Roku (IPO) Redfin (IPO) UpWork (IPO) BladeLogic (IPO) Virident (acquisition) Q1 Labs (acquisition) Virtusa (IPO) etc.

Prior to Globespan I was a top ranked Wall Street analyst at First Albany and was recognized by the Wall Street Journal and Fortune magazine as a Wall Street All Star.

I am a strong believer in the power of human ingenuity especially when it is allowed to thrive in the context of an open liberal democratic and capitalist society. I thoroughly enjoy participating in all aspects of entrepreneurial value creation and the risk capital that is necessary to cultivate it. I fully expect to work within the broad realm of entrepreneurial value creation for the rest of my life.
current_position_description:
Streamlined Ventures is a seed-stage investment firm aimed at investing in software applications as well as the the enabling technologies and infrastructure underlying them. Our areas of interest involve companies that use AI agentic workflows data science APIs software automation or Web3 technologies to disrupt the dynamics of their markets.

The firm will lead or participate in seed rounds with an initial investment of up to $2 500 000. In the last 14 years the firm has seed invested in nearly 20 companies that are now valued at over $1Bn 3 over $10Bn and two over $100Bn. We have a roster of promising seed stage companies from which over 50 are valued at over $100M. Some examples of companies in which we have seed invested include Applovin (APP) DoorDash (DASH) Rappi Bolt EasyPost FLYR etc.

More on our firm at our website - www.streamlined.vc.
company_description:
We are a seed stage investment firm rooted in the belief that the founders of companies are the true heroes of entrepreneurial value creation in our society.

company_description:
Adentris is an AI compliance copilot that prevents small medical documentation errors from becoming costly disasters.

Adentris integrates directly with hospital EHRs monitors clinical activity in real time and uses AI agents to detect and fix issues — like missed discharge notes or wrong medication times — before they trigger claim denials or audits. When a problem is found our AI opens a quick conversation with the responsible staff member to confirm and correct it immediately.

Adentris doesn't just alert. We resolve — and help clinics and hospitals improve patient outcomes get more revenue quicker reduce claims denials and reduce pressure on clinical teams.
headline: CEO of Adentris (YC X25) UC Berkeley Health Engine Forbes Cloud 100

about:
I've spent 17+ years building and scaling retail technology — from being the first tech hire at RentTheRunway to leading engineering at QVC 1-800-Flowers and Tory Burch.

Across every role the same challenge kept showing up: Retail systems were fragmented. Data was messy. Decision-making was slow.

Now retailers face even more pressure to modernize and become AI-ready — but most aren't set up for it.

That's why I founded Ekyam: An AI-native platform that connects ERP WMS OMS and e-commerce systems into an AI ready unified real-time inventory and operations layer.

No middleware headaches. No manual stitching. Just clean integrations live data and actionable insights.

If you're a retail leader looking to unify systems cut costs and enable AI-driven operations — I'd love to connect.
current_position_description:
Ekyam.ai is your ultimate AI-powered unified e-commerce solution revolutionizing retail operations with intelligent automation. Our AI agents seamlessly connect ERP WMS OMS POS and e-commerce platforms into one powerful real-time system for unbeatable efficiency and growth. 

With Ekyam retailers gain a holistic AI-driven view of their inventory and business processes enabling smarter decision-making uncovering revenue opportunities and reducing operational costs through streamlined EDI processes and advanced AI automation.
current_position_2: Member of the Board of Advisors
company_description:
Integration and data issues are the most expensive hidden problem in retail. Systems like your ERP WMS OMS and POS don’t talk to each other and without real-time inventory information write-offs are inevitable. Data isn’t standardized. And the rise of AI makes these issues even more glaring. 

Ekyam is an AI-native middleware built specifically for the complexity of the retail ecosystem. We unify fragmented retail systems using retail-specific data standards and enable real-time visibility an AI-ready data foundation and semantic clarity.

And now introducing Ekyam riOS (Retail Intelligence Operating System): The only conversational interface that moves beyond business intelligence and executes operations (like generating and submitting purchase and transfer orders changing prices creating discounts running promotions allocating inventory and managing order routing) based on insights.

Trusted by leading retail brands like Payless Kathy Kuo Home and Rowan Ekyam is already helping enterprises turn fragmented systems into connected intelligent operations.

 Book a demo to see what AI-ready retail data can do for your business.
headline: Founder & CTO @Ekyam.ai Supercharge Retail Operations with AI-driven platform Ex-Tory Burch 1-800-Flowers RentTheRunway

"Keiretsu"​ definition Keiretsu is a Japanese term describing a group of affiliated corporations with broad power and reach. Keiretsu Forum is described as a conglomeration of individuals or small companies that are organized around private equity funding for mutual benefit. company_description:
Founded in 2019 AltrixBio is based on research by Jeff Karp PhD and Ali Tavakkoli MD of Mass General Brigham and Harvard Medical School. Inspired by the rapid resolution of type 2 diabetes following bariatric surgery they modified sucralfate—a therapy with over 40 years of clinical use—to replicate these metabolic benefits creating AJN003 a proprietary bio-engineered once-daily oral therapy.

AJN003 forms a temporary barrier in the stomach duodenum and jejunum altering nutrient sensing to trigger a metabolic reset. Preclinical data show it improves insulin resistance and key metabolic hormones (GLP-1 GIP ghrelin leptin) driving improved glycemic control and weight loss. As a small molecule with no systemic exposure AJN003 offers a novel patent-protected approach to treating type 2 diabetes obesity and other metabolic diseases.

The AltrixBio team comprises scientists clinicians and business leaders with deep scientific operational and commercial expertise.
headline: Chairperson of the Board @ AltrixBio Inc. Biotechnology Medical Devices Private Equity Venture Capital

Previously Jay was Founding Managing Director of Samsung Ventures where he established and led the US venture capital operations for Samsung responsible for U.S. based investments and portfolio management. Jay started his venture capital career at the Silicon Valley office of Vertex Management the Singapore based venture capital arm of investment firm Temasek Holdings. 

Jay is also an active angel investor and advisor to several start-ups including Coupang (NYSE: CPNG) KiwiCo Korbit (acq'd by Nexon) Korea Credit Data Merit Noom SoFi (NASDAQ: SOFI) and Tapas (acq'd by Kakao).

Jay received an MBA from Stanford University and M.S/B.S. in Chemistry from Seoul National University. Jay currently serves as Board Director at Abacus Anyware Robotics Bria AI Rabot and Gauss Labs. Jay serves as a Board Director of the Asia America MultiTechnology Association (AAMA) and on the National Advisory Council of the Association of Asian American Investment Managers (AAAIM).

company_description:
WE7 AI is the carbon-first marketing intelligence platform built for CMOs.

WE7 AI is an AI-driven decision intelligence platform for marketing leaders who are accountable for growth risk and climate responsibility at the same time.

By moving carbon analysis upstream into the decision-making stage WE7 AI helps CMOs:

reduce digital marketing waste 

protect ROI before budgets are spent and

meet CSRD and Scope 3 requirements without slowing teams down or adding reporting friction.

Reduction First. Responsibility Always.
WE7 AI does not sell carbon offsets or claim neutrality. Instead we operationalize regenerative innovation inside everyday marketing decisions:

Reduce
AI-driven intelligence surfaces inefficiencies waste and carbon-intensive choices before campaigns go live — not after results are locked in.

Restore
For unavoidable residual impact WE7 AI structurally supports verified Blue Carbon ecosystem restoration as part of the business model — not as a post-hoc offset.

For CMOs navigating performance pressure regulatory scrutiny and trust erosion WE7 AI turns climate responsibility into a defensible growth advantage — not a reporting burden.

about:
Mir Haque is a Financial Inclusion evangelist for the unbanked and the founder of Fairbanc the first scalable AI-powered working capital credit and payments platform for emerging market small- medium enterprises (SMEs) that requires no collateral credit history smartphone ownership nor any digital or financial literacy. Fairbanc was shortlisted for Cannes Lions Award for sustainable development and was selected as a finalist for the UN Digital Finance Award TechStars and innovation festival Innovfest in Singapore. Fairbanc is currently in the process of extending digital credit to thousands of micro-merchants in partnership with multinational FMCG brands like Unilever Nestle Coca Cola. and Danone. Fairbanc is backed by ADB Vertex (Temasek) East Venture Sampoerna Lippo 500 and Accion.

Mir a native of Bangladesh who came to the US all alone as a teenager with virtually no money fully self-financed his education through a series of odd jobs like driving a graveyard shift NYC Yellow Taxi and working as a construction worker. Once temporarily homeless himself Mir is now a recognized champion for the unbanked and a thought leader in the Digital Financial Inclusion space. 

Under the banner of Aphaea Capital Mir leads a global advocacy for the unbanked. Mir recently organized forums to discuss Financial Inclusion of the world's unbanked with President Vicente Fox of Mexico Permanent Secretary of Kenya in Nairobi and with His Excellency Minister Jabbar in Bangladesh. Mir’s team also met with the newly elected Vice President of Indonesia and formed partnership with the largest Islamic Social organization Nahdlatul Ulama to offer Sharia compliant digital finance to its 100M members.

Mir a Wharton MBA has previously worked for McKinsey & Company Deutsche Bank Google and Adobe and has recently led corporate strategy for realtor.com 

Mir also writes for popular sites like Venture Beat Knowledge@Wharton Inman etc. Mir is currently dedicating most of his time building a mobile lending ecosystem in Southeast Asia. .
